mapper.sql: kaii.id, kaii.kpi_annual_id,kaii.year,kaii.serial_number, kaii.assessed_department_name, kaii.assessed_department_id, kaii.examine_type, kaii.target_dimension, kaii.key_performance_indicator, kaii.define, kaii.weight, kaii.threshold, kaii.target_value, kaii.challenge_value, kaii.examine_department_id, kaii.examine_department_name, kaii.examine_employee_name, kaii.examine_employee_work_card, kaii.examine_employee_id, kaii.data_accuracy, kaii.data_type, kaii.group_id, kaii.operation_code, kaii.error_msg, kaii.data_status, kaii.create_time, kaii.create_by, kaii.update_time, kaii.update_by ,kaii.parent_department

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.kpi_annual_id as ${tAlias}_kpi_annual_id, ${tAlias}.year as ${tAlias}_year, ${tAlias}.serial_number as ${tAlias}_serial_number, ${tAlias}.assessed_department_name as ${tAlias}_assessed_department_name, ${tAlias}.assessed_department_id as ${tAlias}_assessed_department_id, ${tAlias}.examine_type as ${tAlias}_examine_type, ${tAlias}.target_dimension as ${tAlias}_target_dimension, ${tAlias}.key_performance_indicator as ${tAlias}_key_performance_indicator, ${tAlias}.define as ${tAlias}_define, ${tAlias}.weight as ${tAlias}_weight, ${tAlias}.threshold as ${tAlias}_threshold, ${tAlias}.target_value as ${tAlias}_target_value, ${tAlias}.challenge_value as ${tAlias}_challenge_value, ${tAlias}.examine_department_id as ${tAlias}_examine_department_id, ${tAlias}.examine_department_name as ${tAlias}_examine_department_name, ${tAlias}.examine_employee_name as ${tAlias}_examine_employee_name, ${tAlias}.examine_employee_work_card as ${tAlias}_examine_employee_work_card, ${tAlias}.examine_employee_id as ${tAlias}_examine_employee_id, ${tAlias}.data_accuracy as ${tAlias}_data_accuracy, ${tAlias}.data_type as ${tAlias}_data_type, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.parent_department as ${tAlias}_parent_department
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_assessment_indicators_interface (kpi_annual_id,year,serial_number, assessed_department_name, assessed_department_id, examine_type, target_dimension, key_performance_indicator, define, weight, threshold, target_value, challenge_value, examine_department_id, examine_department_name, examine_employee_name, examine_employee_work_card, examine_employee_id, data_accuracy, data_type, group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by,parent_department) values (#{kpiAnnualId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{serialNumber,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{assessedDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessedDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{examineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetDimension,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keyPerformanceIndicator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threshold,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{challengeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{examineDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineEmployeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineEmployeeWorkCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dataAccuracy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update kpi_assessment_indicators_interface set kpi_annual_id = #{kpiAnnualId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, year = #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, serial_number = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=BIGINT}, assessed_department_name = #{assessedDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assessed_department_id = #{assessedDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, examine_type = #{examineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_dimension = #{targetDimension,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_performance_indicator = #{keyPerformanceIndicator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, define = #{define,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threshold = #{threshold,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_value = #{targetValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, challenge_value = #{challengeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_department_id = #{examineDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, examine_department_name = #{examineDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_employee_name = #{examineEmployeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_employee_work_card = #{examineEmployeeWorkCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_employee_id = #{examineEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, data_accuracy = #{dataAccuracy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_type = #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, parent_department = #{parentDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
